prompt: Evaluate the procedure sequence and state what must happen before work can continue.
scenario: You are on a heavy-industrial construction or process site where work follows engineered drawings, specifications, and permits. The work under review is Wire pulling (feeders & branch), part of the Electrical scope. The observed field condition is: exceeded sidewall pressure/jamming (planning item). The work is actively in progress. Reference material on hand: NEC 200.6, 210.5 (identification).
title: Sequence check: Wire pulling (feeders & branch) (industrial site)
